title: coelogyne pachyphylla
intro: Coelogyne pachyphylla, also known as the Spotted Coelogyne or the Green Dendrobium, is a type of orchid native to the tropical forests of Asia. The Coelogyne pachyphylla is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to soothe and heal wounds. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting digestion. In herbal preparations, Coelogyne pachyphylla is often used to make infusions, teas, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
